name: conscious-business
description: Fred Kofman's 'Conscious Business: How to Build Value Through Values' — an integral approach to leadership that combines unconditional responsibility, essential integrity, ontological humility, authentic communication, constructive negotiation, impeccable coordination, and emotional mastery for building conscious organizations.
useCase: Developing conscious leadership skills, building a values-driven organization, improving communication and negotiation, fostering a culture of responsibility and integrity, and integrating personal mastery with business success.
knownRisks: Deeply philosophical with heavy references to integral theory (Ken Wilber) — may feel abstract for practical-minded readers
Some concepts challenge conventional business assumptions
Requires significant personal reflection and practice — not a quick-fix guide
The spiritual/existential framework may not resonate with all readers
